title: Trichophyllum tuberculosum
taxonomy: Trichophyllum tuberculosum is classified within the family Polytrichaceae, which includes mosses. The family Polytrichaceae is part of the division Bryophyta, a group of non-vascular plants. The division Bryophyta is further classified within the kingdom Plantae, making Trichophyllum tuberculosum a flowering plant. However, it's worth noting that Trichophyllum tuberculosum is actually a moss, not a flowering plant, so it should be classified within the kingdom Plantae, division Bryophyta, and family Polytrichaceae. Further, it should be classified within the order Polytrichales and class Bryopsida.
